testcase.name: 表单渲染所有字段: VideoProduction.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > imports and uses ToolForm with toolKey video-production
表单渲染所有字段: VideoProduction.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > ToolForm has video-production case with sourceCopy textarea
表单渲染所有字段: VideoProduction.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > ToolForm video-production case has videoType select and duration select
表单渲染所有字段: VideoProduction.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > VideoProduction page uses videoProductionInput schema
表单渲染所有字段: VideoProduction.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > submitLabel 生成方案
zod 校验失败显示中文 message > sourceCopy min 10 中文 error message
zod 校验失败显示中文 message > sourceCopy max 3000 中文 error message
zod 校验失败显示中文 message > videoType invalid enum value fails
zod 校验失败显示中文 message > valid input passes
submit 调 trpc.videoProduction.generate.useMutation > VideoProduction page calls trpc.videoProduction.generate.useMutation
submit 调 trpc.videoProduction.generate.useMutation > mutation result is passed to VideoProductionResult
submit 调 trpc.videoProduction.generate.useMutation > VideoProduction page renders FeedbackButton with VideoAgent
submit 调 trpc.videoProduction.generate.useMutation > ToolResult switch includes video-production case
LS 写入 + 读取 (D-031) > getToolLsKey generates correct namespaced key for video-production
LS 写入 + 读取 (D-031) > ToolForm handles LS restore for video-production toolKey
LS 写入 + 读取 (D-031) > VideoProductionResult renders storyboard table with data-testid
?historyId 预填 > VideoProduction page reads historyId from searchParams
?historyId 预填 > VideoProduction page calls trpc.history.detail.useQuery with historyId
?historyId 预填 > historyDefaults uses inputSummary for sourceCopy
?historyId 预填 > VideoProductionResult handles JSON.parse failure → 解析失败
?historyId 预填 > VideoProductionResult renders equipment and schedule sections
VideoProductionResult COLUMNS header→key 1:1 映射 (PRD-6 AC-2) > 景别列 key=angle · BGM列 key=bgm · 画面描述列 key=description
VideoProductionResult COLUMNS header→key 1:1 映射 (PRD-6 AC-2) > ShotItem interface contains 7 production-mode fields
